questions.question: Production: KafkaSink с EXACTLY_ONCE, checkpoint interval = 5 минут, default transaction.timeout.ms. Замечают duplicate events. Что причина?

options.text: Default transaction.timeout.ms = 60s, but checkpoint = 5 min. Когда checkpoint takes longer than 60s — Kafka aborts transaction. Flink pre-commits но commit phase fails — recovery может create inconsistencies. Fix: setProperty('transaction.timeout.ms', '900000') — must быть significantly > max checkpoint duration. Also verify Kafka broker transaction.max.timeout.ms >= 900000
Это normal — EXACTLY_ONCE даёт at-most duplicate 1%

questions.explanation: Critical Kafka EOS gotcha. Default Kafka transaction.timeout.ms = 60s, broker max = 15min. If Flink checkpoint takes > transaction.timeout.ms → Kafka aborts transaction → Flink thinks it's still alive → records либо lost либо при recovery duplicated. Production rule: transaction.timeout.ms = max(2 × checkpoint_interval, 900_000ms). Also broker config transaction.max.timeout.ms must allow this. Plus enable.idempotence=true (mandatory для EOS). Setup correctly — true exactly-once preserved end-to-end.

questions.question: Что означает transactionalIdPrefix в KafkaSink и почему он должен быть уникальный per job?

options.text: Flink uses pattern {prefix}-{subtask}-{checkpointId} для Kafka transactional.id. На recovery Flink lists transactions matching prefix, aborts orphaned, resumes valid. Если две jobs use same prefix — Kafka zombie fencing aborts конкурента → data loss / corruption
Это deprecated — Kafka теперь автоматически генерирует ID

questions.explanation: transactionalIdPrefix — critical для recovery semantics. Kafka transactional.id уникальный per producer instance — два producers с same ID → Kafka aborts один (zombie fencing). Flink generates IDs по pattern {prefix}-{subtask}-{checkpointId}. На recovery lists transactions матching prefix, aborts orphan (incomplete from crashed instance), resumes valid pending. Fix: unique prefix per job ('prod-fraud-tx', 'staging-fraud-tx', 'analytics-tx'). Common bug: two deployments same prefix → continuous fencing → data loss.

questions.question: После migration от FlinkKafkaConsumer к KafkaSource (FLIP-27), Flink не подхватывает новые Kafka partitions добавленные runtime. Что fix?

options.text: Restart job — partitions подхватываются только при start
Dynamic partition discovery disabled by default в KafkaSource. setProperty('partition.discovery.interval.ms', '30000'). FlinkKafkaConsumer имел enabled by default — easy migration trap
Это limitation FLIP-27 — нет dynamic discovery

questions.explanation: Subtle migration trap. FlinkKafkaConsumer (legacy) had partition discovery enabled by default (~5 min interval). KafkaSource (FLIP-27) — disabled by default (must explicit enable). Fix: setProperty('partition.discovery.interval.ms', '30000') — 30s discovery cycle. Это потому что FLIP-27 favors explicit configuration over magic defaults. Easy production gotcha при upgrade — new partitions silently miss, lag accumulates, downstream incomplete. Always enable explicit для long-running jobs.

questions.question: KafkaSink (FLIP-191 SinkV2) с EXACTLY_ONCE использует Two-Phase Commit: pre-commit на checkpoint barrier (producer.flush()), commit на notifyCheckpointComplete (producer.commitTransaction()).
questions.explanation: Правда. KafkaSink реализует TwoPhaseCommittingSink interface (SinkV2). Phase 1 (pre-commit): на checkpoint barrier SinkWriter calls producer.flush() — все pending records written к Kafka brokers within open transaction, но НЕ committed. Records invisible для read_committed consumers. SinkV2 produces Committable (handle к transaction). Phase 2 (commit): после JobManager confirms all operators successfully checkpointed (notifyCheckpointComplete callback), KafkaSink Committer calls producer.commitTransaction() — records become visible. На failure between phases: recovery restores Committables из checkpoint, re-commits pending transactions. Это foundation exactly-once в Kafka sink.
